prompts: Write Phase 1 roadmap spec covering MCP server completion and deck stability
output: Created .claude/specs/PHASE_1_ROADMAP.md — comprehensive spec covering: MCP server gap analysis + completion tasks, deck type bug inventory, DeckDetailPage fix, SQLite deck API persistence, Docker volume setup, TanStack Query frontend migration, localStorage migration, Docker orchestration audit, and full deck QA checklist

prompts: Fix Google auth sign-in flow showing React Router error page
Audit and fix remaining v0 production release gaps
output: Fixed: added /auth/ proxy in apps/web/src/server/server.ts so auth routes (GET /auth/google, GET /auth/callback, GET /auth/me, POST /auth/logout) are proxied to rest-api instead of being rendered as React routes. Updated apps/web/src/server/lib/routes.ts with missing WEB_ROUTES and WEB_ROUTE_PATTERNS entries for /dashboard, /sign-in, /cards/:id, /decks/browse. Dev note: GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI must be http://localhost:3000/auth/callback for local dev (not 3001).
